title: Current Ratio
content:
Formula: Current Assets / Current Liabilities
Interpretation: Measures ability to pay short-term obligations
Benchmark: > 1.5 is healthy, < 1 indicates potential liquidity issues

title: Quick Ratio (Acid-Test)
content:
Formula: (Current Assets - Inventory) / Current Liabilities
Interpretation: More conservative than current ratio
Benchmark: > 1.0 is good

title: Debt-to-Equity Ratio
content:
Formula: Total Liabilities / Shareholders' Equity
Interpretation: Measures financial leverage
Benchmark: < 2.0 typically preferred, varies by industry

title: Gross Profit Margin
content:
Formula: (Revenue - COGS) / Revenue
Interpretation: Profitability after direct costs
Benchmark: Varies significantly by industry

title: Return on Equity (ROE)
content:
Formula: Net Income / Average Shareholders' Equity
Interpretation: Profit generated from shareholder investments
Benchmark: > 15% generally strong

title: Inventory Turnover
content:
Formula: COGS / Average Inventory
Interpretation: How quickly inventory sells
Benchmark: Higher is better, varies by industry
